title: Transformers should not be accessed directly when a Scikit-learn pipeline uses caching
description: Directly accessing transformers in a Scikit-learn pipeline can break the pipeline's caching mechanism.
message: Direct access to transformer outside Scikit-learn pipeline

noncompliant.code:
pipeline = Pipeline([('scaler', StandardScaler()), ('clf', RandomForestClassifier())])
X_transformed = pipeline.scaler.transform(X)
X_predicted = pipeline.clf.predict(X_transformed)

compliant.code:
pipeline = Pipeline([('scaler', StandardScaler()), ('clf', RandomForestClassifier())])
X_transformed, _ = pipeline.fit_transform(X)

metadata.title: Transformers should not be accessed directly when a Scikit-learn pipeline uses caching
